twilio.alphanumeric_note: Alphanumeric sender ID works ONLY for international (non-US/Canada) recipients. For US/Canada, phone number will always show.

email_to_sms_gateways.note: Email-to-SMS gateways are less reliable but work as fallback. Configure SMTP settings in main config.

setup_instructions: 1. Choose your preferred SMS provider (Twilio, MessageBird, or Vonage)
2. Create an account with your chosen provider
3. Get your API credentials from the provider's dashboard
4. Update the credentials in this config file
5. Set 'enabled': true for your chosen provider
6. Set your phone numbers in recipients/phone_numbers.txt
7. Make sure 'use_sms': true and 'send_to_numbers': true in main config.json
8. Set 'use_message_prefix': true to add prefixes like 'ALERT:', or false to send plain messages
testing: Start with email-to-SMS gateways for initial testing
Use proper SMS APIs for production sending
Monitor rate limits to avoid being blocked
Test with your own phone number first
twilio_setup: Get your Account SID and Auth Token from console.twilio.com
Buy a phone number from Twilio to use as 'from_number'
Replace YOUR_TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and YOUR_TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN with real values
